shared_rules.hatch_consistency: Use the official Hatch mascot reference as the source of truth.

assets.hatch_variant: pointing narrator integrated into story scene
assets.alt: Hatch standing before a grid of Notion template cards representing multiple use cases.
assets.caption: Notion Template Gallery — when the community builds the onboarding.
assets.prompt: Notion Template Gallery | hero: Hatch mascot (the HackProduct robot with the graduation cap and growth arrow) standing in front of a grid of colorful template cards representing different use cases — project tracker, reading list, habit tracker, CRM. Cap tilted, welcoming expression, no speech. Cream background. Watermark: "HackProduct" wordmark bottom-right, 60% opacity, JetBrains Mono. Aspect 2400x1350. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. No exact logos, no fake screenshots, no real person likenesses, no implied company endorsement. Do not include a watermark in the generated source because watermarking is applied after approval.
assets.crop_notes: Center-cover crop checked against role safe zone.
qa: Official Hatch reference required by prompt and manifest.
Watermark applied in post-processing.
No exact logos, fake screenshots, real person likenesses, or implied endorsement.

assets.alt: Hatch gesturing between a blank workspace and a gallery of templates, illustrating the blank-page problem.
assets.caption: Hatch gesturing between a blank workspace and a gallery of templates, illustrating the blank-page problem.
assets.prompt: Notion Template Gallery | hatch-narrator: Hatch in narrator pose, gesturing at a blank white workspace on a screen — empty, intimidating, with a blinking cursor. The blank page represents the new-user problem. To the right, a gallery of filled-in templates waiting. Cream background, no speech bubble. Watermark: "HackProduct" wordmark bottom-right, 60% opacity, JetBrains Mono. Aspect 1600x1600. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression.
